Docs & Components

  1. Safety

  2. Home
  3. Safety
USIS Safety

Safety module home (Plan 7): company and site programs, field inspection, incidents—canonical store for OSHA-oriented training and JHAs.

Prev|Index|Next

Plan references: Plan 7 (Safety), Plan 21 (HR + Safety operating model), Plan 20 — Site map and navigation.

Safety owns regulatory training records, project JHAs, daily pretasks, observations, and incidents (Plan 7). HR owns onboarding and policy acknowledgments; Core HR (directory) and the HR dashboard show read-only safety cert snapshots only—edit certs and site programs here, not in HR.

Company-wide

Policies, manuals, JHA templates, training register, leadership KPIs (TRIR / DART / near-miss).

Documents hub
Project / site

Project safety plan, project JHAs, daily pretask, crew checklists, site conditions.

Projects
Field / inspect

Quick observation with photo, PPE checks, optional AI safety review (local model).

Incidents & corrective

Recordables, root cause, corrective actions linked to punch list / change orders.

Also in scope (Plan 7)
  • Subcontractors: safety docs and attestations via RFP / vendor flows — RFP list.
  • Compliance: Cal/OSHA / OSHA-oriented exports ship with incident and training workflows.
  • HR handoff: workers’ comp / return-to-work stays coordinated with HR case files when those flows exist (Plan 21).
